name: Notes on: push: branches: - main schedule: - cron: '26 16 * * *' # Daily at 00:00 UTC workflow_dispatch: # Optional: Run manually from GitHub permissions: contents: read pages: write id-token: write jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/configure-pages@v4 - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3 with: path: . - uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
